intentSynonyms: look up customer coupons in priceline
fetch a single customer coupons in priceline
view one specific customer coupons in priceline
get your available coupons in priceline
description: Get available coupons for the authenticated user. Coupons can be filtered by product type (STAY, FLY, DRIVE). Returns coupon codes, descriptions, expiration dates, and discount amounts.

product.description: Product type to filter coupons (default STAY)
